title: Retenzy.pdf
summaries:
* Retenzy is an all-in-one customer retention and loyalty platform designed for e-commerce brands on Shopify.
* The software was founded in 2023 and is headquartered in Pune, India.
* It combines customer rewards, referral structures, and product reviews to boost customer lifetime value (LTV).
* Loyalty program features include points-based economies, tier-based VIP tracks, and custom milestones.
* Integrated review management automates text, photo, and video review collection via email or SMS, syncing them with Google Shopping and generating SEO-rich snippets.
* The platform allows businesses to create custom referral networks to turn existing customers into brand advocates.

* Integration with Google Shopping and generation of SEO-rich snippets.
* Custom referral networks and membership tiers with perks like early product access, free shipping, or special discounts.
* Built-in marketing automation email flows, including welcome emails, shipping updates, abandoned cart reminders, and post-purchase follow-ups.
* Retenzy features over 15 pre-built visual front-end storefront widgets.
* Storefront widgets display loyalty incentives and review sections without requiring custom development work.
